# .vscode

Configures Visual Studio Code workspace settings for Attractor monorepo. Contains IDE-specific preferences controlling file visibility, editor behavior.

## Contents

[settings.json](./settings.json) — Configures `files.exclude` to hide `*.sum` checksum files from Explorer view.

## Configuration

`files.exclude`: `{"**/*.sum": true}` — Excludes all `.sum` extension files from VS Code Explorer sidebar.

## Behavioral Contracts

File exclusion pattern: `**/*.sum` — Matches any file ending in `.sum` in any directory, preventing display in VS Code file explorer.
